title: staelia hassleri
intro: Staelia hassleri, also known as the "False Jasmine" or "Coral Honeysuckle", is a flowering vine native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Staelia hassleri include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
